scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run server:dev" "npm run nlp:dev"
scripts.nlp:setup: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd 'nlp-service'; $py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $py) { Write-Error 'Python is not installed or not on PATH. Install Python 3.11+ from python.org (check Add to PATH).'; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path '.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe')) { python -m venv .venv }; & '.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' -m pip install --upgrade pip; & '.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' -m pip install -r requirements.txt"
scripts.nlp:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd 'nlp-service'; $py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $py) { Write-Error 'Python is not installed or not on PATH. Install Python 3.11+ from python.org (check Add to PATH).'; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path '.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe')) { python -m venv .venv; & '.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' -m pip install --upgrade pip; & '.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' -m pip install -r requirements.txt }; & '.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload"
